name: vn-bun-rieu
input: a bowl of bún riêu cua with crab paste, tomato broth, and tofu
notes: Northern VN crab + tomato noodle soup. Ground truth: VN MOH 2017 composition table for bún riêu (per 700ml serving) + USDA blue swimming crab. Tomato broth + tofu adds protein variability — advisory tier per testing-strategy.md §3.1.
